Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: John Vannucci, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to CRC 225 at the request of Counsel for Plaintiff. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Continued To Nov-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-03-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
John Vannucci, Esq. special appearance for and with the Plaintiffs, all present in court at 11:30 A.M.
John Huster, Esq. and Tom Huster, Esq., for and with the Defendant: Eugene Choi, also present.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows: Matter to be Dismissed without prejudice, parties to bear own fees and costs.
Tolling of the affirmative cross-complaint by the Defendant's daughter.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 Calendar of Oct. 3, 2006 in Dept. 218 at 10:00 A.M. for DISMISSAL.

RULING: Argued and the Court Grants Attorney Sandoval's motion to withdraw as counsel for Plaintiffs Fanny Sum Woo, Alexander Woo and Steven Woo.
